'''fadhanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yoghurd|yoghurd]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-dh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yoghurd|yoghurd]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fadhanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fædhængæth|fædhængæth]] || [[word:fædhængæj|fædhængæj]] || [[word:fædhængæsh|fædhængæsh]] || [[word:fædhængæ|fædhængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fadhadhangath|fadhadhangath]] || [[word:fadhadhangaj|fadhadhangaj]] || [[word:fadhadhangash|fadhadhangash]] || [[word:fadhadhanga|fadhadhanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fadhangath|fadhangath]] || [[word:fadhangaj|fadhangaj]] || [[word:fadhangash|fadhangash]] || [[word:fadhanga|fadhanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fadhafngafth|fadhafngafth]] || [[word:fadhafngafj|fadhafngafj]] || [[word:fadhafngafsh|fadhafngafsh]] || [[word:fadhafngaf|fadhafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fadhangatha|fadhangatha]] || [[word:fadhangaja|fadhangaja]] || [[word:fadhangasha|fadhangasha]] || [[word:fadhangaka|fadhangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fadhangath|fadhangath]] || [[word:fadhangaj|fadhangaj]] || [[word:fadhangash|fadhangash]] || [[word:fadhanga|fadhanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fadhangathal|fadhangathal]] || [[word:fadhangajal|fadhangajal]] || [[word:fadhangashal|fadhangashal]] || [[word:fadhangakal|fadhangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fadhangaathatha|fadhangaathatha]] || [[word:fadhangaajaja|fadhangaajaja]] || [[word:fadhangaashasha|fadhangaashasha]] || [[word:fadhangaaka|fadhangaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fadhangathan|fadhangathan]] || [[word:fadhangajan|fadhangajan]] || [[word:fadhangashan|fadhangashan]] || [[word:fadhangakan|fadhangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fadhangathaoro|fadhangathaoro]] || [[word:fadhangajaoro|fadhangajaoro]] || [[word:fadhangashaoro|fadhangashaoro]] || [[word:fadhangakaoro|fadhangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
